issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing 'count' (max 1), 'types' filter for SMILE type, and does not represent the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic with deck bottom placement.

DSL lacks the full sequence: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) play up to 1 SMILE Character with cost ≤3, (3) place rest at bottom in any order. Current action only attempts card selection without the view/arrangement steps.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; play up to 1 {SMILE} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
